chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – The urine of the animals and their droppings

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/160)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/160)
text: هُمَا قَالَا لَا تَغْسِلْ ثَوْبَكَ مِنْ بَوْلِ شَيْ‏ءٍ يُؤْكَلُ لَحْمُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Zurara,
Both, (5<sup>th</sup> and 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) said: ‘There is no need to wash your clothes from the urine of something that you can eat - its flesh’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Zurarah who has said the following: “The two Imam, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, have said, ‘It is not necessary for you to wash your clothes because of urine of the edible animals.’”
